title: melilotus vulgaris var. minor
intro: Melilotus vulgaris var. minor, also known as small sweet clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Melilotus vulgaris var. minor include its ability to support the cardiovascular system, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural anticoagulant. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
